top3.sql:
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" 
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" <= 17 AND "High Grade" >= 5
  AND "School Type" = 'Continuation'
  AND "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" ASC
LIMIT 3;

FROM frpm
